details: The agent ran actual kubectl-axi commands against the cluster and correctly identified the root cause: the readiness probe targets port 8080 (path /healthz) but nginx listens on port 80, causing connection refused errors. The agent supported this conclusion with evidence from pod view output showing the probe configuration ('http :8080/healthz') and port 80 declaration, plus the Warning event showing the exact connection refused error on port 8080.
